Label.text: v2: click rows to select, click headers to sort (numeric-aware). Up/Down when focused. Overflow scrolls with selection.

DataTable.rows: Ava Carter|Product Designer|APAC|91;Noah Kim|Frontend Engineer|NA|88;Mia Chen|Data Analyst|EMEA|94;Liam Patel|QA Engineer|APAC|86;Emma Garcia|PM|NA|90;Ethan Rossi|Backend Engineer|EMEA|89;Sophia Diaz|UX Researcher|LATAM|87;Lucas Brown|DevOps Engineer|NA|92;Olivia Park|SRE|APAC|95;James Wright|Security|NA|84;Amelia Ng|Mobile Engineer|APAC|93;Henry Cho|Platform|EMEA|88

Label.text: Static (selectable=false, sortable=false) still renders like v1.
